topic: Reading a Biography: Commander Abhilash Tomy
title: Commander Abhilash Tomy's Incredible Journey and Parenthesis
simple_explanation: This page tells us about a super brave sailor who sailed all around the world by himself! It was really hard, and he got hurt in a storm, but he was rescued. We also learned how to use special little curvy lines called brackets to tuck in extra details into our sentences without confusing anyone!
detailed_explanation: Later, in 2018, he joined another big sailing race called the Golden Globe Race. It was a super tough challenge, and he faced a terrible storm that badly damaged his boat. He got hurt and couldn't move easily. Luckily, after four days adrift, rescue teams found him. He was taken to an island for help. His bravery and strong will helped him survive this incredibly difficult journey, showing how determined he is! We also learn about a special way to add extra information to our sentences using brackets, called parenthesis. This extra detail makes the sentence more interesting, but the sentence would still make sense without it.

examples_expanded.text: Commander Tomy (who was only allowed to use paper maps) had a very tough journey.
examples_expanded.context: This example shows how we use the concept of reading a biography: commander abhilash tomy in a real sentence.

examples_expanded.text: My favourite animal (a fluffy cat) loves to nap in the sun.
examples_expanded.context: This example shows how we use the concept of reading a biography: commander abhilash tomy in a real sentence.

guided_practice: Identify the meaning of 'circumnavigation' in a sentence. Remember it means: travel all the way around something, like the Earth.
Match the word 'replica' with a similar concept from your own experience.
Look at the first example again. How would you modify it to make it your own?
application_tasks: Create 3 of your own sentences using the core idea of Reading a Biography: Commander Abhilash Tomy.
Imagine you are teaching this topic to a friend. Write down exactly what you would say.
challenge_tasks: Combine the concept of 'circumnavigation' with something you learned in a previous chapter to write a short paragraph.
Can you find an exception to this rule or a creative way to bend it? Explain how.
key_points: Commander Abhilash Tomy completed an amazing solo journey around the world.
A biography tells the factual story of a real person's life, written by someone else.
Brackets are used for parenthesis, which adds extra, non-essential information to a sentence.

vocabulary.definition: travel all the way around something, like the Earth.
an exact copy of something, like a model boat.
unable to move, often because of an injury.
a non-fiction story about someone else's life.
extra information added to a sentence, usually within brackets, dashes, or commas.
